summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blendlink Marketplace Social Features (Iteration 44). All 5 user requirements verified: 1) AI Listing button hidden on Profile page, 2) Marketplace categories expanded to 17 with 'Digital Goods & NFTs', 3) Like/Share buttons visible on marketplace listings, 4) Like endpoint works with auth and returns 401 for non-auth, 5) AI Listing Creator has category dropdown and Share to Feed toggle (default ON).
passed_tests: Backend: 'Digital Goods & NFTs' category exists with id='digital'
Backend: New categories (jewelry, health, pets, baby, toys, etc.) all present
Backend: /api/marketplace/listings/{id}/like works for authenticated users (returns liked/likes_count)
Backend: /api/marketplace/listings returns listings with seller info
Frontend: Marketplace page shows 'Digital Goods & NFTs' in category filter
Frontend: Marketplace listing cards have Like buttons (6 found)
Frontend: Marketplace listing cards have Share buttons (6 found)
Frontend: Share button shows 'Link copied to clipboard!' toast
Frontend: Profile page does NOT show AI Listing button (hidden via {false && ...})
Frontend: Profile page shows My Albums, Seller Tools, Earnings buttons
Frontend: AI Listing Creator page loads with step indicator (Photos → Details → Price → Shipping → Publish)
Code Review: AIContentPreview component has category dropdown with data-testid='category-select'
Code Review: AI Listing Creator has shareToFeed state initialized to true (ON by default)
Code Review: Share to Feed toggle has data-testid='share-to-feed-toggle'
critical_code_review_comments: AI Listing button hidden via {false && (...)} pattern - code preserved for future use
MARKETPLACE_CATEGORIES constant in backend has 17 categories including new ones
ListingSocialActions component handles non-logged-in users with toast prompt
Share button uses navigator.share API with clipboard fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 marketplace social features verified working: 1) AI Listing button hidden on Profile, 2) 17 categories with 'Digital Goods & NFTs', 3) Like/Share buttons on listings, 4) Like endpoint with auth check, 5) AI Listing Creator has category dropdown and Share to Feed toggle. Marketplace requires authentication - non-logged-in users redirected to login.
